scripts.storage:clean:npm: npm cache verify && npm cache clean --force && npm cache verify
scripts.storage:pw:browsers:list: [ -d "$HOME/.cache/ms-playwright/.links" ] && playwright install --list || printf 'No Playwright browsers installed\n'
scripts.storage:pw:browsers:refresh: mkdir -p "$HOME/.cache/ms-playwright/.links" && (playwright uninstall || true) && playwright install chromium firefox && playwright install --list
scripts.storage:maintenance: npm run storage:clean:reports && npm run storage:clean:npm && npm run storage:pw:browsers:list
